meaning: adj.蜘蛛一般的,细长足的,蜘蛛网一般的
examples: He saw her spidery writing on the envelope.
She picked it up. Written on the handle, in spidery black ink, were the words "Leaks like a sieve."
The brain and its long spidery neurons are essentially made of fat, but they communicate with each other via proteins.
L. one afternoon, Steltzner showed me a scale model of the final design, with its spidery legs.
Musically, Manzarek's spidery organ on "Light My Fire" is one of the most instantly recognizable sounds in rock history.
